# ── REMOVED (71→42 sources) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# BrowseWebsitesWithoutLoggingIn — breaks login/register flows
# AdVoid.Addon.NoExternals — blocks ALL external resources
# AdVoid.Addon.NoExtras — too aggressive third-party blocking
# ThaiParanoidBlock/maximum — "maximum paranoid" mode
# ThaiParanoidBlock/ThaiParanoid.txt — still paranoid-level aggressive
# soteria-nou/widgets — blocks all widget domains
# chat-annoyances.txt — hides legitimate customer support
# ShadowWhisperer/Ads — unmaintained, overly broad
# kano1/badway — overly aggressive
# kano1/I/adware.txt — personal unmaintained
# kano1/I/adware_Scrip.txt — personal unmaintained
# orca.pet/notonmyshift — breaks interactive elements
# bjornstar/hosts — unmaintained, false positives
# nicktabick/adblock-rules — personal niche list
# cdn.adblockcdn.com/adblock_custom — generic custom rules, overlap
# OsborneSystems/Columbia — poorly documented personal list
# NanoAdblocker/NanoFilters/NanoAnnoyance — NanoAdblocker discontinued/compromised!
# Hunter-Github/the-best-stack-overflow — breaks StackOverflow UI
# Karmesinrot/Anifiltrs — anime-specific niche
# DandelionSprout/AnnoyancesList-2ndDivision — "2nd division" = lower quality rules
# DandelionSprout/AncientLibrary/Czech Filters — ancient/unmaintained
# DandelionSprout/stayingonbrowser — niche mobile use case
# EnergizedProtection/unblock — project discontinued
# CrusheerPL/AlleBlockV2 — personal Allegro-specific list
# DRSDavidSoft/unwanted-iranian — regional niche (PersianBlocker is better)
# farrokhi/adblock-iran — regional niche (PersianBlocker is better)
# Manu1400/i-don-t-care-about-newsletters — personal, tiny list
# caffinewriter/DontPushMe — personal, barely maintained
# cjx82630/cjx-ublock — ublock-specific variant, have cjx-annoyance
# deathbybandaid/PopupBlocker — PiHole-parsed duplicate of fanboy
# eEIi0A5L/kotori_filter — Japanese niche personal list
# eEIi0A5L/mochi_filter_2gun — Japanese niche personal list
# ilyakatz/inpage_popups — personal, tiny list
# jiayiming/jCleanList_all — "_all" variant = aggressive
# kowith337/GelboLube — imageboard-specific niche
# kowith337/MiscAnnoyance — personal miscellaneous
# kowith337/AntiForceLike — Thai niche
# theel0ja/CrapBlock — personal "crap block" list
# fanboy-swedish — regional niche (Frellwits is better maintained)
# filters.adtidy.org/windows/* — Windows desktop app variants, not browser
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
